name: My ears are ringing from factory noise at work in Salt Lake City, what should I do first?
description: See a doctor for audiogram, notify employer in writing, document everything immediately.[2]

mainEntity.name: My ears are ringing from factory noise at work in Salt Lake City, what should I do first?

acceptedAnswer.text: See a doctor for audiogram, notify employer in writing, document everything immediately.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Immediately see a doctor for an audiogram and notify your employer in writing.** In Utah, workplace hearing loss from harmful industrial noise is compensable under workers' compensation if linked to job exposure.[2][6] Key factors include documenting noise levels over 90 decibels, your use of provided protection, and medical proof of causation.[1][2] Get all records, file a claim promptly within statutory limits (typically 1-3 years), and avoid signing insurer statements without advice. Consult a workers' comp specialist to protect your rights.[3]
